title: Johnson & Johnson India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Johnson & Johnson India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!
